description_long: This is a compact, two-seater sofa with a classic Chesterfield-inspired design, featuring a low, rolled backrest and armrests of equal height. The upholstery is a solid, medium brown color with visible button tufting on the backrest, adding a touch of elegance and texture. The seat consists of a single, uniform cushion that appears plush and comfortable, seamlessly integrated into the frame. The armrests are thick, rounded, and padded, providing both comfort and a traditional aesthetic. The sofa stands on four short, tapered wooden legs, slightly splayed for stability and style. Its overall proportions and sturdy build make it suitable for urban outdoor or indoor settings such as parks, lobbies, or waiting areas.
description: A compact, brown Chesterfield-style sofa with button-tufted backrest, rolled armrests, and short wooden legs. The design is plush, classic, and suitable for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the button-tufted backrest, rolled armrests, and single seat cushion.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the rounded armrest and the sofa's depth.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, continuous back and the rolled top edge.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, again showing the armrest and the sofa's compact profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Single, uniform seat cushion and a continuous, button-tufted backrest cushion; all cushions appear attached and integrated.
attribute_armrest_style: Rolled, padded armrests at the same height as the backrest, thick and rounded with classic Chesterfield styling.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, tapered wooden legs positioned at the corners, slightly splayed outward, with a visible wood texture.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, continuous backrest with a rolled top edge and button tufting, matching the height of the armrests.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid brown upholstery with visible button tufting on the backrest, giving a textured, classic appearance.
